message:
Add spatial indexing dependencies to workspace

Add dependencies for spatial data structures that will be used by the
scriptbots-index crate:

- ordered-float: For using floats as ordered keys in spatial structures
- rstar: R-tree implementation for efficient spatial queries
- kiddo: k-d tree implementation for fast nearest-neighbor searches

These dependencies enable efficient spatial indexing for the simulation,
allowing quick collision detection and resource queries as agent populations
scale.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
